# IMeTech Engineering — Full Site Index

> Complete product development from idea to working prototype. One engineer, every discipline.

Short index: https://imetech.nl/llms.txt
RSS feed: https://imetech.nl/sitemap.rss
Sitemap: https://imetech.nl/sitemap.xml

IMeTech Engineering is a freelance engineering firm founded by Ivo Mengerink, based in Aalten, Achterhoek, Gelderland, the Netherlands. Full-stack product development: mechanical design (SolidWorks, CSWP certified), electronics and PCB design, embedded software (C++, Python, PLC), data science and machine learning, from concept through prototype to production.

## Company

- Founder: Ivo Mengerink, BSc Mechatronics (Saxion/HAN), CSWP Certified SolidWorks Professional
- Location: Vierde Broekdijk 1, 7122JD Aalten, Gelderland, Netherlands (Achterhoek region)
- Email: info@imetech.nl | Phone: +31 6 12385439
- Client rating: 5.0/5.0
- Service area: Achterhoek, Gelderland, Netherlands (also remote/international projects)

## Services

### Software Development
- NL: https://imetech.nl/diensten/softwareontwikkeling/
- EN: https://imetech.nl/en/services/software-development/
- Embedded software development and PLC programming for industrial automation. C++, Python and control software.

### Electronics & PCB Design
- NL: https://imetech.nl/diensten/elektronica-pcb-ontwerp/
- EN: https://imetech.nl/en/services/electronics-pcb-design/
- PCB design, electronics development and PCB testing for embedded systems and IoT. Production-ready PCB designs.

### Mechanical Design & CAD
- NL: https://imetech.nl/diensten/mechanica-cad-tekeningen/
- EN: https://imetech.nl/en/services/mechanical-cad-drawings/
- CAD drawing and mechanical design with SolidWorks. 3D CAD, production drawings and rapid prototyping by CSWP certified engineer.

### Data Science & Machine Learning
- NL: https://imetech.nl/diensten/data-science-machine-learning/
- EN: https://imetech.nl/en/services/data-science-machine-learning/
- Machine learning and AI development for industrial applications. Data science, predictive maintenance and ML pipelines.

### Product Development
- NL: https://imetech.nl/diensten/productontwikkeling/
- EN: https://imetech.nl/en/services/product-development/
- Complete product development from idea to prototype. Concept development, R&D and prototype engineering.

## Projects (19)

- 2x2 Stuurrobot — Crab Drive steering robot (robotics, embedded): https://imetech.nl/projecten/2x2-steering-robot/
- 6-DoF Spacemouse — Stewart platform CAD input device: https://imetech.nl/projecten/6-dof-spacemouse/
- Adresprint SCD30 PCB — Modbus RTU address board for CO2 sensors: https://imetech.nl/projecten/adresprint-scd30-pcb/
- Besturing Rollator — Rollator control PCB and firmware with laser guidance: https://imetech.nl/projecten/besturing-rollator/
- Besturingskasten — Air quality control panels (ammonia, CO2, PLC): https://imetech.nl/projecten/besturingskasten/
- CarryVision Plantcamerasysteem — ESP32-CAM timelapse system for greenhouses: https://imetech.nl/projecten/carryvision-plantcamerasysteem/
- Dubbele Labvoeding — Dual adjustable lab power supply: https://imetech.nl/projecten/dubbele-labvoeding/
- Fume Extractor — Portable soldering fume extractor with active filter: https://imetech.nl/projecten/fume-extractor/
- Keypad Controller PCB — 4x5 button matrix with ESP32 and USB-C: https://imetech.nl/projecten/keypad-controller-pcb/
- Automatische Laptopstand — Smart laptop stand with face recognition: https://imetech.nl/projecten/laptop-stand/
- Letterklok — Modern word clock with laser-cut front: https://imetech.nl/projecten/letterklok/
- Magnetisch Levitatie Plantenpot — Magnetic levitation planter: https://imetech.nl/projecten/magnetische-levitatie-plantenpot/
- Multifunctioneel Soldeerstation — Combined soldering iron and hot air station: https://imetech.nl/projecten/multifunctioneel-soldeerstation/
- Plantsappers 3D Productietekeningen — SolidWorks production drawings for juice press: https://imetech.nl/projecten/plantsappers-3d-productietekeningen/
- POC Proximity Chat — UWB proximity communication with ESP32: https://imetech.nl/projecten/poc-proximity-chat/
- Schets tot Render — Sketch to photorealistic 3D render: https://imetech.nl/projecten/schets-tot-render/
- SmartLamp PCB — RGBW LED driver with ESP32 and USB-C charging: https://imetech.nl/projecten/smartlamp-pcb/
- USB-C Li-Ion Oplaad PCB — Compact Li-ion charging PCB: https://imetech.nl/projecten/usb-c-laad-pcb/
- Zelfbalancerende Kubus — Self-balancing cube with flywheels: https://imetech.nl/projecten/zelfbalancerende-kubus/

English project pages: https://imetech.nl/en/projects/

## Blog (12 articles)

- Automatiseren van sensordata-annotatie — ML annotation automation for time-series sensor data: https://imetech.nl/blog/automatiseren-sensordata-annotatie/
- Machine learning in productontwikkeling — ML applications, training data, elderly care and navigation: https://imetech.nl/blog/machine-learning-productontwikkeling/
- Datagedreven besluitvorming voor kleine productiebedrijven — Data-driven manufacturing for SMEs, OEE dashboards: https://imetech.nl/blog/datagedreven-productie/
- Dashboards bouwen die niet-technische mensen gebruiken — Dashboard design for non-technical stakeholders: https://imetech.nl/blog/effectieve-dashboards-niet-technisch/
- Van idee tot prototype workflow — Product development workflow from concept to prototype: https://imetech.nl/blog/van-idee-tot-prototype-workflow/
- Softwareontwikkeling voor embedded systemen — Firmware to application software guide: https://imetech.nl/blog/softwareontwikkeling-embedded-systemen/
- Van prototype naar kleine serie productie — Prototype to small-batch production guide: https://imetech.nl/blog/prototype-naar-productie/
- Python koppelen aan industriële PLC's — Python + OPC UA/Modbus for IT/OT integration: https://imetech.nl/blog/python-industriele-plc-integratie/
- ESP32 vs STM32 — Microcontroller comparison for product developers: https://imetech.nl/blog/esp32-vs-stm32/
- Concept ontwikkeling en iteratief ontwerp — Structured concept development methods: https://imetech.nl/blog/concept-ontwikkeling-iteratief-ontwerp/
- Betrouwbare printplaten ontwerpen — PCB design best practices (EMC, DFM, derating): https://imetech.nl/blog/betrouwbare-printplaten-ontwerpen/
- Embedded systemen — Introduction to embedded systems and IoT: https://imetech.nl/blog/embedded-systemen/

English blog: https://imetech.nl/en/blog/
